vocab.meaning: đạt được sự ổn định tài chính
vocab.example: By utilizing long-term savings plans, individuals can slowly garner financial stability for their retirement.

vocab.meaning: đảm bảo một khoản vay thế chấp (mua nhà)
vocab.example: Most people rely on reputable banks to secure a mortgage when they decide to purchase their first home.

vocab.meaning: quản lý tính thanh khoản (tiền mặt sẵn có)
vocab.example: Current accounts offer excellent liquidity management, allowing instant access to cash for daily expenses.
Certain banking investment products serve as a strategic way of hedging against inflation to preserve purchasing power.

vocab.meaning: trách nhiệm ủy thác (trách nhiệm bảo vệ tài sản khách hàng)
vocab.example: People trust banks because these institutions have a fiduciary duty to act in the best interest of their depositors.
Small business owners often turn to banks to request a credit facility to expand their operations.

vocab.meaning: dịch vụ quản lý tài sản
vocab.example: High-net-worth individuals often utilize specialized wealth management services offered by private banks.

vocab.meaning: các giao thức ngăn ngừa gian lận
vocab.example: Modern banks implement rigorous fraud prevention protocols to monitor and flag suspicious account activity.

vocab.meaning: chuyển tiền điện tử (thường là quốc tế)
vocab.example: Expats frequently use banks to execute a wire transfer to send financial support to their families abroad.

vocab.meaning: khả năng thanh toán tài chính
vocab.example: Banks are required to maintain a high level of financial solvency to ensure they can meet all withdrawal demands.
